title: lastrea caripensis
intro: Lastrea caripensis, also known as the Caripensis fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and may be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
